_descriptor_type: A type of descriptor. One of 'simulation', 'trace', and 'perf'.
_user: A username to run perf top-down analysis. Some application requires root permission to get running.
_root_dir: Root directory mounted into the docker container home, for instance, $tmp_dir as a root home directory
_image_name: A docker image name required to run a benchmark with Perf.
_perf_core: (Optional) Logical CPU to pin all measurements to. Must be a valid core on the target machine. Omit to use the run_perf.py default PERF_CORE.
_max_repeats: (Optional) Cap on repeats per workload. Setting target_seconds huge will force exactly this many repeats regardless of runtime. Omit to use the run_perf.py default PERF_REPEAT_DEFAULT.
_target_seconds: (Optional) Target wall time per measurement. Omit to use the run_perf.py default PERF_TARGET_SECONDS.
